code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triple objects into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    from collections import defaultdict

    # Predicate-to-phrase mapping with more natural language
    verb_map = {
        "almaMater": "studied at",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "birthName": "was born as",
        "birthPlace": "was born in",
        "dateOfRetirement": "retired in",
        "occupation": "worked as",
        "status": "is",
        "timeInSpace": "spent",
        "mission": "flew on",
        "selectedByNasa": "was selected by NASA in",
        "deathDate": "died on",
        "nationality": "was a citizen of",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "served as Chief of the Astronaut Office in",
        "title": "held the title of",
        "ribbonAward": "received",
        "operator": "was operated by",
        "backupPilot": "had backup pilot",
        "commander": "was commanded by",
        "crewMembers": "included",
        "representative": "was represented by",
        "alternativeName": "was also known as",
        "awards": "received",
        "fossil": "has fossil",
        "senators": "has senator",
        "part": "is part of",
        "partsType": "has parts type",
        "higher": "is higher than",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "bird": "has bird",
        "leader": "has leader",
        "affiliation": "is affiliated with",
        "competeIn": "competes in",
        "president": "has president",
        "award": "received award",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "gemstone": "has gemstone",
        "mascot": "has mascot",
        "cosparId": "has COSPAR ID",
        "utcOffset": "has UTC offset",
    }

    # Helper to clean quoted strings
    def _clean(o: str) -> str:
        o = o.strip()
        if (o.startswith('"') and o.endswith('"')) or (o.startswith("'") and o.endswith("'")):
            return o[1:-1]
        return o

    # Build object-to-subject mapping for relative clause connections
    object_to_subjects = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        object_to_subjects[_clean(t.object)].append(t)

    # Group facts by subject
    subject_facts = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        verb = verb_map.get(t.predicate, f"has {t.predicate}")
        obj = t.object
        if t.predicate == "timeInSpace":
            obj = f"{obj} minutes"
        subject_facts[t.subject].append((verb, _clean(obj)))

    # Identify main subject (most frequent subject)
    if not subject_facts:
        return ""

    main_subject = max(subject_facts.keys(), key=lambda s: len(subject_facts[s]))
    main_facts = subject_facts[main_subject]

    # Build main subject sentence
    if len(main_facts) == 1:
        verb, obj = main_facts[0]
        sentence = f"{main_subject} {verb} {obj}."
    else:
        parts = [f"{verb} {obj}" for verb, obj in main_facts]
        sentence = f"{main_subject} " + ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + f", and {parts[-1]}."

    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
